task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context; inspected 99_system tree; read nested cast AGENTS.MD before using canonical entity files.
function.outcome_justification: AGENTS.md and 10_entities/cast/AGENTS.MD state cast files are authoritative for birthdays. Search across visible cast files showed the earliest upcoming birthday after the context date 2026-03-23 is 03-26, and 10_entities/cast/lukas.md confirms the exact name Lukas Brenner with birthday 1988-03-26.
